title: Evolutionary Analyses of Visual Opsin Genes in Frogs and Toads
author: Ryan K Schott
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b3wgqpbw

steps.title: Transfer sample into a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer sample into a 1.5ml collection tube

steps.title: Pipette off RNALATER
steps.instruction: Pipette off RNALATER

steps.title: Add 600 µL Buffer RLT
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL Buffer RLT

steps.title: Add 6 µL Beta-mercaptoethanol
steps.instruction: Add 6 µL Beta-mercaptoethanol

steps.title: Disrupt tissue with sterile pestle
steps.instruction: Disrupt tissue with sterile pestle

steps.title: Pipette into Qiashredder column- Spin 00:02:00 @ 8,000rpm
steps.instruction: Pipette into Qiashredder column- Spin 00:02:00 @ 8,000rpm

steps.title: Remove Qiashredder column; Add cap -...
steps.instruction: Remove Qiashredder column; Add cap - Spin 00:03:00 @ max speed

steps.title: Add 600 µL 70% Ethanol to new collection tube
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL 70% Ethanol to new collection tube

steps.title: Transfer lysate to the collection tube-...
steps.instruction: Transfer lysate to the collection tube- mix lysate and 70% Ethanol by pipetting
10. Transfer lysate to RNeasy column ( 700 µL at a time)- Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm; Discard flow through/ Add rest of lysate; Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm; Discard flow through
11. Add 700 µL Buffer RWI- Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm
12. Transfer RNeasy column to new collection tube
13. Add 500 µL Buffer RPE- Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm; Discard flow through
14. Add 500 µL Buffer RPE – Spin 00:01:00 @ 9,800rpm; Discard Flow through/ Spin 00:02:00 @ 13,000rpm
15. Transfer RNeasy column to new collection tube
16. Elute with 30 µL RNAse-Free H20- Spin 00:01:00 @ 13,00rpm
17. Elute with 30 µL RNAse-Free H20- Spin 00:01:00 @ 13,00rpm
1. Combine mRNA and RNAse-free H20 to standardize all samples to aliquots containing 0.4μg mRNA total in 10μl.
2. Make 2 Master mixes

steps.title: Master Mix 1
steps.instruction: Master Mix 1: add 1 µL dntp mix and 2 µL dT primer per sample

steps.title: Master Mix 2
steps.instruction: Master Mix 2: add 4 µL Buffer, 4 µL DTT and 0.5 µL RNAase inhibitor per sample
3. Pipette 3 µL of Master Mix 1 into each sample.
4. Place sample on dry bath at 65 °C for 00:05:00 .
5. Put samples On ice for 00:01:00 .
6. Pipette 6.5 µL of Master Mix 2 into each sample.
7. Pipette 1 µL Superscript into each sample.
8. Incubate samples Room temperature for 00:10:00 .
9. Incubate samples at 42 °C for 00:50:00 .
1. Keep all reagents on ice at all times.

steps.title: 2. Make a master mix. Per sample add the following
steps.instruction: 2. Make a master mix. Per sample add the following: 2.0 µL 10X Buffer 1.0 µL 50mM MgSO4 0.5 µL dNTP mix (10mM each) 18.4 µL ddH2O 1 µL forward primer (10μM) 1 µL reverse primer (10μM) 0.5 µL taq polymerase
3. Mix well by spinning.
4. Add 24 µL of Master Mix to each PCR tube.
5. Add 1 µL of sample for a total of 25 µL per tube.

steps.title: 6. Program the thermocycler for the following program
steps.instruction: 6. Program the thermocycler for the following program: 95 °C for 00:10:00 94 °C for 00:02:00 REPEAT FOLLOWING 3 steps 35-50 times 94 °C for 00:00:30 45 °C - 50 °C for 00:01:00 *temp depends on primer 72 °C for 00:02:00 END Repeat 72 °C for 00:02:00 4 °C hold
